channel.title: Ownership on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA
channel.description: Recent content in Ownership on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: Why Jobs Are No Longer Enough in the AI Economy
item.description: *Work, ownership, and the new architecture of economic security*By Po-Sung(Sinclair) HuangFor decades, people believed that working hard was enough.In the AI era, that assumption is quietly breaking.N
